name: umbraculum-platform-tsjs-cursor-assistant
description: Umbraculum-platform-specific Cursor assistant for the TS/JS half of the platform: encodes the four-slice foundation-hardening discipline (lint + types + tests + docs) and multi-tenant workspace-scoped architectural patterns. Pair with umbraculum-node-react-cursor-assistant for full ecosystem coverage, and with umbraculum-toolset-common for the language-agnostic meta-framework rules.
